items.title: Samsung to hold its Galaxy S26 event on February 25
items.description: Samsung is going to launch S26 lineup just before Mobile World Congress (MWC).

items.title: With co-founders leaving and an IPO looming, Elon Musk turns talk to the moon
items.description: According to The New York Times, which reports that it heard the meeting, Musk told employees that xAI needs a lunar manufacturing facility, a factory...

items.title: OpenAI policy exec who opposed chatbot’s “adult mode” reportedly fired on discrimination claim
items.description: The executive has denied the allegation that she engaged in discrimination.

items.title: Okay, now exactly half of xAI’s founding team has left the company
items.description: Whatever the cause of the departures, the cumulative impact is alarming. There is a lot of work left to do at xAI, and an IPO will bring more scrutiny...

items.title: Amazon may launch a marketplace where media sites can sell their content to AI companies
items.description: A new report claims the e-commerce giant is looking to create a pipeline of licensable content between media publishers and AI companies.
